title: This Trade Show Magician Attracts Decision Makers to Your Booth
description: Looking for New Trade Show Booth Ideas? Experience the Magic of a Packed Booth & Thousands of Qualified Leads with Expert Trade Show Magician Robert Strong.

blocks.html: Expert Trade Show Magician Robert Strong
Experience the magic of a packed trade show booth and thousands of qualified leads.
Need Trade Show Booth Ideas? Watch Robert’s Reel:

Top 10 Reasons to Have Robert Strong in Your Trade Show Booth:

  1. Robert attracts huge crowds to your booth.

  2. Robert communicates your messaging in a fun and memorable way.

  3. Robert amazes and delights the attendees with magic and comedy.

  4. Robert qualifies leads so that your sales team is always busy speaking with the decision-makers.

  5. Robert warms up the audiences, introduces your presenters/SMEs (sales matter experts), lead trade show booth games through magic, and keeps everything running smoothly.

  6. Robert moves people directly from his show to your demos so that they’re primed to connect with your team and your solutions.

  7. Robert helps generate social media engagement from your customers.

  8. Robert trains your booth staff to be more effective.

  9. Robert helps define your event goals, booth design, branding, messaging, scheduling, giveaways, raffles, and overall strategy and tactics for the best possible ROI.

  10. Robert gives your customers a fun and memorable experience and makes your company look like the most successful booth on the trade show floor.

blocks.html:
Trade Show Magician Robert Strong is Trusted by Some of the Largest Companies in the World!

Google, Microsoft, Apple, Lenovo, Dell EMC, HPE, Cisco, AWS, Salesforce, SAP, and Oracle love Robert Strong. He lives in Silicon Valley, specializes in the tech industry, and excels at meeting the high standards and specific requirements of major corporate events. Through his magic and humor, Robert creates an amazing connection for your team with your customers; all the way from the skeptical engineers who use your solutions to the C-Suite Executives who pay for your solutions.

Watch Robert Strong captivate your customers and drive more leads to your booth. His trade show clients usually see a 10x increase in lead count by having him in their booth. Robert would be happy to provide references on request. He has been presenting at 20 to 25 trade shows a year for the past 20 years and knows how to help you level up your trade show results.

blocks.alt: The text, "Watch The Magic" With an arrow.
Text reading "See Robert in Action" with an arrow pointing to the video.

blocks.html: Frequently Asked Questions for Trade Show Magician Robert Strong:
Can Robert Strong customize his performances for specific corporate themes or messages?

Robert's specialty is tailoring his magic to fit your company's theme, message, and brand, making it a memorable experience for your team/customers (especially if you happen to be in the tech industry). He lives in Palo Alto, the heart of Silicon Valley, and has 20 years of experience communicating tech solutions to engineers in a way that they understand; he speaks engineer fluently.
How does hiring Robert Strong, the trade show magician, benefit a company?
See Top 10 Reasons to Have Robert Strong in Your Booth, plus his trade show clients usually see a 10x increase in the lead count by having him in their booth.
How much space does Robert Strong need to perform magic at a trade show?

Ideally, you work with Robert when choosing your booth size, booth location, and booth design to optimize for a successful ROI, but he can work in a 10x10 or even a tabletop exhibit. If you’re looking for small trade show booth ideas, Robert brings all of his own equipment, which could include a small riser, a small table, and a small but powerful sound system. Trade show magician Robert Strong will gather a crowd around your booth in minutes!
What if Robert is not available, or if I need multiple magicians for my organization’s trade show setup?

Robert has been doing this for years and has plenty of trade show display ideas and interactive trade show booth ideas in addition to an amazing roster of magicians. Robert Strong is the perfect entertainer to help you surpass your trade show goals.
How much does it cost to have Robert Strong in our booth?

It depends on a lot of factors, including location (is it near, far, or very far from his home in the Bay Area), number of days, number of hours per day, number of shows per hour, the length of the presentations, the amount of scripting and memorization needed, and the add-ons that can include providing the staging, the lighting, the sound, creating the PowerPoint presentations, providing the raffles/giveaways, hiring experienced brand ambassadors to staff your booth, training your booth staff, and/or consulting to help you define and achieve your goals.
Contact him now to discuss how to make your trade show event spectacular!
